problem id: eeda9bd9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01101101 -> 10110111
  01000100 -> 00010010
  10000000 -> 00000100
  01101010 -> 10101011
  11110010 -> 11001111
  00011011 -> 01101100
  10100010 -> 10001101
  01011001 -> 01100110
  10101011 -> 10101001
  10011100 -> 01110100

query: 01111110
predicted answer: 11111011
